task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only, cannot start/end with hyphen)
Create a JSON CloudFormation template snippet that defines an AWS IAM role with a trust relationship allowing EC2 instances to assume it
Write a regex pattern that matches valid AWS ARN formats (e.g., arn:aws:service:region:account-id:resource)
